CVE-2023-7258.title: A denial of service exists in Gvisor Sandbox where a bug in refer ...
CVE-2023-7258.description: A denial of service exists in Gvisor Sandbox where a bug in reference counting code in mount point tracking could lead to a panic, making it possible for an attacker running as root and with permission to mount volumes to kill the sandbox. We recommend upgrading past commit 6a112c60a257dadac59962e0bc9e9b5aee70b5b6

CVE-2025-2713.title: Google gVisor's runsc component exhibited a local privilege escal ...
CVE-2025-2713.description: Google gVisor's runsc component exhibited a local privilege escalation vulnerability due to incorrect handling of file access permissions, which allowed unprivileged users to access restricted files. This occurred because the process initially ran with root-like permissions until the first fork.
